channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [剧场版] Anime News Network Sonic Hedgehog: Memories Beyond Short Animated Film Revealed Sneak Peek Video
item.description: Short film celebrates 35 years of Sonic the Hedgehog ― Sega announced the Sonic the Hedgehog: Memories and Beyond 35th anniversary short film on Saturday at Anime Expo 2026. The company revealed a... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Sonic the Hedgehog: Memories and Beyond Short Animated Film Revealed in Sneak Peek Video

item.title: [动画] MyAnimeList MyAnimeList Reports from 动画 Expo 2026
